ingredients.title: Ingredients for the Fish
items: 800 g white fish fillets (cod, haddock, or halibut)
steps: Mix mayonnaise, cornichons, capers, shallot, herbs, lemon juice, and mustard to make tartar sauce.
Refrigerate sauce for at least 30 minutes.
Whisk flour, cornstarch, baking powder, and salt.
Add egg and cold sparkling water to form smooth batter.
Pat fish dry and season with salt and pepper.
Heat oil to 180°C and dip fish into batter.
Deep fry for 4–6 minutes until golden and crisp.
Drain on rack or paper towels.
Serve with tartar sauce and lemon wedges.
chefTips: Keep batter ice cold for crisp texture.
Do not overcrowd fryer while cooking.
Use rack instead of paper towels for crispiness.
Add lemon zest to tartar sauce for freshness.
